params.name: Horn of Heimdall
params.source: Demon Chest (0.1%), Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wishing (0.06%)
params.description:
On Jun 10, 1500 BC, Heimdall's horn was blown again.
Heimdall had a mouth full of gold teeth, eyes that could see three hundred miles away, and ears that could hear in all directions. When he lay on the ground, he could hear the sound of grass growing. He restlessly guards the entrance to heaven on Rainbow Bridge to defend against the forest giants. He rides a horse with a golden mane and carries the Gjallarhorn. In case of emergency, he blows the horn to summon the gods.
[Horn Info]
